positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial dragon soaring through a nebula of glowing cosmic dust. The dragon has intricate, geometric scales in deep sapphire and emerald tones, contrasted against the rich purples, blues, and golds of the galaxy. The style is detailed neo-traditional tattoo art mixed with Art Deco geometry, emphasizing clean lines and strong silhouettes. The composition is central, featuring the dragon in powerful flight against a backdrop of swirling, stylized constellations and nebulae. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting to make the dragon glow against the cosmic void. Perfect for an apparel print, high contrast, vector-like details, pop art influence, --ar 1:1
